Findings.Title: Conditional Access policy missing for legacy auth block
Findings.Detail: Maester test CA-001 found no policy blocking legacy authentication protocols.
Findings.Remediation: Create CA policy targeting all users blocking legacy authentication.

Findings.Title: Security defaults disabled and no replacement CA baseline
Findings.Detail: Tenant has security defaults off without an equivalent baseline policy set.

Findings.Title: Authentication methods policy enforces FIDO2
Findings.Detail: FIDO2 enabled and required for privileged users.
